'''Ivo Laibach''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]-trained [[CompForce/Legends|CompForce]] [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. A few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], [[Zevulon Veers]] was assigned to be Laibach's bodyguard while he interrogated [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] captured in a standard police operation. While interrogating an old [[Librarian/Legends|librarian]] by torturing and beating him, the Rebels staged a rescue. Laibach went outside to deal with them, and was wounded.
